Terroir Study Markdown | 06.28.2021

Matthew Clark

Abstract

Evaluation of key cold hardy hybrid grape cultivars for development and wine quality across harvest dates along a transect across Minnesota and North Dakota. aka MDA Specialty Crop Block Grant 2018 “Terroir Study Brianna”

setwd("C:/Users/clark776/Dropbox/ENOLOGY DATA/Terroir Study Matt Working Data")
df<-read.csv(file='TerroirData_combined.csv', head=TRUE, na.strings="-")
df[,'Year'] <- as.factor(df[,'Year'])
attach(df)
library(tidyverse)
## -- Attaching packages --------------------------------------- tidyverse 1.3.1 --
## v ggplot2 3.3.4     v purrr   0.3.4
## v tibble  3.1.2     v dplyr   1.0.7
## v tidyr   1.1.3     v stringr 1.4.0
## v readr   1.4.0     v forcats 0.5.1
## -- Conflicts ------------------------------------------ tidyverse_conflicts() --
## x dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
## x dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
#some of these weren't loadign right so i used install.packages("stringi",type="win.binary")
library(ggpubr)
library(agricolae)
library(lme4)
## Loading required package: Matrix
## 
## Attaching package: 'Matrix'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:tidyr':
## 
##     expand, pack, unpack
## Registered S3 methods overwritten by 'lme4':

##   cooks.distance.influence.merMod car 
##   influence.merMod                car 
##   dfbeta.influence.merMod         car 
##   dfbetas.influence.merMod        car
library(car)
## Loading required package: carData

## The following object is masked from 'package:dplyr':

library(emmeans)### formerly library(lsmeans) ??
library(multcomp)
## Loading required package: mvtnorm
## Loading required package: survival
## Loading required package: TH.data
## Loading required package: MASS

## Attaching package: 'MASS'

library (ggplot2)
library(lattice)

Plot ALL SITES against GDD x year This seems to work because GDD is int not factor

ggplot(df, aes(gdd, X50_wt, color=Geno.Site)) +
  geom_point(aes(color=Geno.Site, y= X50_wt)) + 
    facet_grid(Genotype~Year) +
  geom_smooth(method = 'lm', se = F)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula 'y ~ x'

ggplot(df, aes(gdd, Juice_bx, color=Geno.Site)) +
  geom_point(aes(color=Geno.Site, y= Juice_bx)) + 
   facet_grid(Genotype~Year) +
  geom_smooth(method = 'lm', se = F)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula 'y ~ x'

ggplot(df, aes(gdd, Juice_ph, color=Geno.Site)) +
  geom_point(aes(color=Geno.Site, y= Juice_ph)) + 
     facet_grid(Genotype~Year) +
  geom_smooth(method = 'lm', se = F)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula 'y ~ x'

ggplot(df, aes(gdd, Juice_ta, color=Geno.Site)) +
  geom_point(aes(color=Geno.Site, y= Juice_ta)) + 
      facet_grid(Genotype~Year) +
  geom_smooth(method = 'lm', se = F)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula 'y ~ x'

ggplot(df, aes(gdd, Wine_ph, color=Geno.Site)) +
  geom_point(aes(color=Geno.Site, y= Wine_ph)) + 
     facet_grid(Genotype~Year) +
  geom_smooth(method = 'lm', se = F)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula 'y ~ x'

     facet_grid(Genotype~Year) +
  geom_smooth(method = 'lm', se = F)
